issues.description: Independent test verification failed during collection: ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'tiktoken'. The test file tests/unit/test_assembly.py and implementation src/fleet_memory/retrieval/assembly.py both import tiktoken, but it is not installed in the Coach's verification environment at /Users/richardwoollcott/Projects/appmilla_github/fleet-memory/.guardkit/worktrees/FEAT-MEM-05/. This is the SAME issue identified in Turn 1 feedback.
issues.requirement: All acceptance criteria require working tests for independent verification
issues.suggestion: Ensure tiktoken is installed in the worktree environment. Run 'cd /Users/richardwoollcott/Projects/appmilla_github/fleet-memory/.guardkit/worktrees/FEAT-MEM-05/ && pip install -e .' to install the package with its dependencies including tiktoken. Then verify with 'pytest tests/unit/test_assembly.py -v' in that same directory. The Player's own environment may have tiktoken installed, but the Coach's verification environment does not.

issues.description: Player report included 6 files in files_modified that show no changes in git status (.claude/task-plans/TASK-RA-003-implementation-plan.md, coverage.json, pyproject.toml, src/fleet_memory/retrieval/__init__.py, src/fleet_memory/retrieval/assembly.py, tests/unit/test_assembly.py). These appear to be orchestrator-managed paths or files from a previous turn incorrectly swept into the current turn's report.
issues.suggestion: Only include files actually modified in this turn in the files_modified list. Exclude orchestrator-managed paths and files that were modified in previous turns.

rationale: Independent test verification failed with ModuleNotFoundError for tiktoken, the same issue identified in Turn 1 feedback. The Player claims tests passed in their environment but did not ensure the Coach's verification environment has the required dependencies installed. Without passing independent tests, I cannot verify any of the acceptance criteria are actually met in practice, regardless of what the Player's self-reported test results claim. The Turn 1 feedback to run 'pip install -e .' in the worktree was not followed or was done in the wrong environment. This is a critical blocker - the implementation may be correct, but independent verification is impossible.
